app.name: Tauri Template
preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.map.mapboxTokenDescription: Loads the map tiles. Paste your agency's public token (pk.…); leave empty to keep the map off — the board still works as a card list.
preferences.map.idleLockMinutesDescripti: Lock the board after this many minutes without interaction. Leave empty for the default of 15.
preferences.general.quickPaneShortcutDes: Global keyboard shortcut to toggle the quick pane from any application
preferences.general.exampleTextDescripti: This is an example text input setting (not persisted)
preferences.general.exampleToggleDescrip: This is an example switch/toggle setting (not persisted)
preferences.advanced.title: Example Advanced Settings
preferences.advanced.toggleDescription: This is an example advanced toggle setting (not persisted)
preferences.advanced.dropdownDescription: This is an example dropdown/select setting (not persisted)
commands.showLeftSidebar.label: Show Left Sidebar
commands.hideLeftSidebar.label: Hide Left Sidebar
commands.showRightSidebar.label: Show Right Sidebar
commands.hideRightSidebar.label: Hide Right Sidebar
commands.openPreferences.label: Open Preferences
commands.windowClose.label: Close Window
commands.windowMinimize.label: Minimize Window
commands.windowToggleMaximize.label: Toggle Maximize
commands.windowFullscreen.label: Enter Fullscreen
commands.windowExitFullscreen.label: Exit Fullscreen
commands.testToast.label: Test Toast Notification
commandPalette.title: Command Palette
toast.error.shortcutRestoreDescription: The shortcut may be out of sync. Please restart the app or try again.
cloudSession.errors.configLoadFailed: Could not read the saved cloud configuration
cloudSession.errors.bootstrapFailed: Could not restore the cloud session
cloudSession.setup.title: Connect to your agency cloud
cloudSession.setup.description: Paste the enrollment payload from your agency administrator.
cloudSession.setup.invalidPayload: That payload is not valid — check it matches the enrollment JSON exactly
cloudSession.setup.probeRejected: The project refused this key — check the enrollment payload
cloudSession.setup.probeUnreachable: Could not reach the project — check the network connection
cloudSession.setup.saveFailed: Could not save the cloud configuration
cloudSession.signIn.title: Sign in
cloudSession.signIn.description: Coordinator account for this agency cloud
cloudSession.gate.title: Cloud schema mismatch
cloudSession.gate.description: This display cannot safely render data from this cloud version.
canvass.cases.title: Active cases
canvass.cases.error: Could not load cases from the agency cloud
canvass.cases.empty.title: No active cases
canvass.cases.empty.description: Cases appear here as soon as investigators sync them from the field.
canvass.locations.error: Could not load this case's locations
canvass.locations.empty.title: No locations yet
canvass.locations.empty.description: Locations appear as investigators add them to this case.
canvass.dvr.title: DVR
canvass.feed.empty.title: Awaiting first activity
canvass.feed.empty.description: Everything that happens on this case lands here, newest first.
canvass.player.unplayableDetail: The format ({{mime}}) is not playable on the board. Open it externally to view.
canvass.map.tokenRejected: Map error — token rejected · check Preferences
canvass.map.tokenMissing.title: A Mapbox token hasn't been set
canvass.map.tokenMissing.description: The board still works — locations stay live in the card list. Add a token in Preferences to light up the map.
canvass.dashboard.empty.title: Awaiting first data
canvass.dashboard.empty.description: No investigators have logged a location on this case yet. The board fills in live as they work.
canvass.dashboard.rowSparse: No details yet — investigator on scene
cloudSession.setup.checkedNote: The code is checked against the cloud before it is saved
cloudSession.setup.footer: Read-only coordinator display · no case data is stored on this machine
cloudSession.signIn.footer: Session is encrypted at rest on this machine
cloudSession.gate.adminNote: Update Canvas Hub, then relaunch — or contact your agency administrator
cloudSession.connection.banner.stale.tit: Board may be stale — no confirmed update since {{time}}
cloudSession.connection.banner.stale.det: Realtime and polling are retrying · do not trust as live
cloudSession.connection.banner.offline.d: Showing last known state from {{time}} · will catch up automatically
cloudSession.lock.title: Board locked
cloudSession.lock.subtitle: The board stays live behind this lock
cloudSession.lock.failed: That password didn't match — try again
processPanel.title: Process monitor
